---
title: "test_convergence.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\test_convergence.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.97
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 4.14
---

## Intent
The `test_convergence.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestTheConvergence, test_synaptic_intelligence_loop. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestTheConvergence, test_synaptic_intelligence_loop. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestTheConvergence`
- `test_synaptic_intelligence_loop`
